chapter_title.ar: باب أَكْلِ مَا يَسْقُطُ مِنَ الْخِوَانِ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 49 – Eat what falls from the food-spread

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (22/118)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (22/118)
text: دَخَلَ رَسُولُ اللَّهِ ( صلى الله عليه وآله ) عَلَى عَائِشَةَ فَرَأَى كِسْرَةً كَادَ أَنْ يَطَأَهَا فَأَخَذَهَا فَأَكَلَهَا ثُمَّ قَالَ يَا حُمَيْرَاءُ أَكْرِمِي جِوَارَ نِعَمِ اللَّهِ عَزَّ وَ جَلَّ عَلَيْكِ فَإِنَّهَا لَمْ تَنْفِرْ مِنْ قَوْمٍ فَكَادَتْ تَعُودُ إِلَيْهِمْ .

en.hubeali: And by this chain, from Amro Bin Jumi’a, from Abu Abdullahasws having said:

‘Rasool-Allah<sup>saww</sup> went over to Ayesha, so he<sup>saww</sup> saw a crumb which he<sup>saww</sup> almost trod upon, so he<sup>saww</sup> took it and ate it. Then he<sup>saww</sup> said: ‘O Humeyra! Honour the neighbourliness of a Bounty of Allah<sup>azwj</sup> Mighty and Majestic upon you, for it does not flee from a people, so it almost does not return to them’.
en.sarwar: 6. Through the same chain of narrators as that of the previous Hadith the following is narrated: from ‘Amr ibn Jami’ who has said the following: “Abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, has said that the Messenger of Allah, O Allah, grant compensation to Muhammad and his family worthy of their services to Your cause, once entered ‘A’ishah’s home and saw pieces of food on which he was about to step. He (the Messenger of Allah) picked them up and said, ‘O Humayra’ you must honor the company of the bounties of Allah, most Majestic, most Glorious, with you; from whoever they get farther away they never then return to them.’”
